github_surges.description: 可溯源的郑希(易方达基金经理)投研 Agent Skill——基于他全部公开观点原文 + 有原话佐证的投资方法 + 全市场基金真实数据，能溯源问答、按他框架给基金打分，绝不杜撰。⚠️仅研究学习辅助，不构成投资建议‼️website是郑希主页！
Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.
A coding-agent skill for multi-phase security audits with independently verified, machine-readable findings
Use ChatGPT Developer Mode as a local coding agent for your repo through MCP.
Claude Code skills that take a founder from idea to a live Claude Managed Agent: interview, scope a v0, launch in their own account, grade it, iterate, and schedule it
The living ecosystem where AI agents learn from real-world work through iterative workflow loops, reusable experience, and collective training signal exchange.
司南：个性化 AI 任务总控 Skills 系统 /COMPASS: Personal Alignment Skills OS for AI Agents
Agent-driven automated CVE discovery platform for source code auditing, vulnerability verification, and report generation.

caveats: 生产报告仅使用真实抓取数据；没有 API Key 时增强源会自动降级。
